reviews.author: Johannes Weiner
reviews.summary: Introduced a new helper function to allocate list_lru heads for folio objects under RCU protection. The function is designed to be lightweight and only pin the memory cgroup when necessary.

2026-03-12.patch_summary: This patch introduces a helper function, memcg_list_lru_alloc_folio(), to allocate list_lru heads for folio objects under RCU protection. The function is designed to be lightweight and only pin the memory cgroup when necessary.
